description: Largest private healthcare provider in Finland offering comprehensive occupational health services, primary care, and specialist services to employers and individuals. Operates clinics nationwide with strong digital health capabilities.
business_model: B2B2C - Occupational health contracts with employers; B2C individual services
target_market: Finnish employers (SMEs and enterprises) and individuals
competitive_advantage: Market leader in Finland, comprehensive service network, strong digital capabilities

varden_fit.rationale: Major competitor in Finland - established player with strong employer relationships
